logger.doc:name: Log Connect Request
logger.message: OAuth connect request received for bank: #[attributes.queryParams.bank default 'unknown'] with access_types: #[attributes.queryParams.access_types default 'none']. Full URL: #[attributes.requestUri]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "missing_parameters", "error_description": "Both bank and access_types parameters are required" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "invalid_scope", "error_description": "Invalid FDX scopes requested: " ++ (payload.invalidScopes joinBy ","), "allowed_scopes": ["ACCOUNT_BASIC", "TRANSACTIONS", "CUSTOMER_CONTACT"] }

%dw 2.0 output application/java import * from dw::core::URL fun bankBrandKey(b) = do { var u = upper(trim(b as String default "")) --- if (u == "RBC" or contains(u, "ROYAL")) "rbc" else if (u == "BMO" or contains(u, "BANK OF MONTREAL") or contains(u, "BMO")) "bmo" else if (u == "TD" or contains(u, "TD") or endsWith(u, "TD") or startsWith(u, "TD")) "td" else if (contains(u, "SCOTIA") or u == "SCO") "scotia" else if (u == "CIBC" or startsWith(u, "CIB")) "cibc" else "default" } fun bankDisplayName(b, k) = if (k == "rbc") "Royal Bank of Canada" else if (k == "bmo") "BMO" else if (k == "td") "TD Canada Trust" else if (k == "scotia") "Scotiabank" else if (k == "cibc") "CIBC" else b default "External bank" fun fdxHuman(code) = if (upper(code) == "ACCOUNT_BASIC") "Account balances" else if (upper(code) == "TRANSACTIONS") "Transactions" else if (upper(code) == "CUSTOMER_CONTACT") "Contact details" else code var bank = trim(attributes.queryParams.bank default "Bank") var accessTypesParam = trim(attributes.queryParams.access_types default "") var requestedTech = (accessTypesParam splitBy ",") map trim($) var brand = bankBrandKey(bank) var scopesHuman = requestedTech map fdxHuman($) /* Composite state echoed by Auth0: bank __OB__ scopes __OB__ uuid — pending OS key uses uuid only; callback can fall back if OS miss */ var uuidPart = uuid() var compositeState = bank ++ "__OB__" ++ accessTypesParam ++ "__OB__" ++ uuidPart var pendingOsKey = "ob_oauth_pending__" ++ uuidPart var baseScopes = "openid profile email" var fdxScopes = requestedTech joinBy " " var allScopes = baseScopes ++ " " ++ fdxScopes var authParams = { response_type: "code", client_id: "${oauth.auth0.client_id}", redirect_uri: "${oauth.auth0.redirect_uri}", scope: allScopes, audience: "${oauth.auth0.audience}", prompt: "consent", state: compositeState } var queryString = (authParams pluck ((value, key) -> "$(key)=" ++ encodeURIComponent(value as String))) joinBy "&" --- { authorizationUrl: "${oauth.auth0.authorize_endpoint}" ++ "?" ++ queryString, state: compositeState, pendingOsKey: pendingOsKey, pendingConsent: { bankName: bank, bankDisplayName: bankDisplayName(bank, brand), bankBrand: brand, scopesTechnical: requestedTech, scopesHuman: scopesHuman, accessTypesCsv: accessTypesParam, createdAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSXXX"} } }

logger.doc:name: Log Authorization URL
logger.message: Built authorization URL: #[payload.authorizationUrl]. State: #[payload.state]. Pending consent stored at #[payload.pendingOsKey].

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output text/plain --- ""

logger.doc:name: Log Error
logger.message: Error in OAuth connect flow: #[error.description]. Error type: #[error.errorType]. Detailed message: #[error.detailedDescription]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "internal_error", "error_description": "An internal error occurred during authorization initiation", "details": error.description default "Unknown error" }

logger.doc:name: Log Callback Request
logger.message: OAuth callback received with code parameter present: #[!isEmpty(attributes.queryParams.code)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- { redirectLocation: "${frontend.base_url}" ++ "${frontend.error_redirect_path}" ++ "&error=missing_code", httpStatus: 302 }

%dw 2.0 output application/x-www-form-urlencoded --- { grant_type: "authorization_code", client_id: "${oauth.auth0.client_id}", client_secret: "${oauth.auth0.client_secret}", code: attributes.queryParams.code, redirect_uri: "${oauth.auth0.redirect_uri}" }

logger.doc:name: Log Token Request
logger.message: Making token exchange request to Auth0

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { access_token: payload.access_token, id_token: payload.id_token, token_type: payload.token_type default "Bearer", expires_in: payload.expires_in, scope: payload.scope default "" }

logger.doc:name: Log Token Success
logger.message: Token exchange successful - Access token length: #[sizeOf(payload.access_token)], ID token present: #[!isEmpty(payload.id_token)]

try.doc:name: Load pending consent from object store

os:retrieve.doc:name: Retrieve pending consent
os:retrieve.key: #[%dw 2.0 var parts = (attributes.queryParams.state default "") splitBy "__OB__" --- if (sizeOf(parts) > 0) "ob_oauth_pending__" ++ parts[sizeOf(parts) - 1] else "ob_oauth_pending__invalid"]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json fun fdxHuman(code) = if (upper(code as String) == "ACCOUNT_BASIC") "Account balances" else if (upper(code as String) == "TRANSACTIONS") "Transactions" else if (upper(code as String) == "CUSTOMER_CONTACT") "Contact details" else code as String fun bankBrandKey(b) = do { var u = upper(trim(b as String default "")) --- if (u == "RBC" or contains(u, "ROYAL")) "rbc" else if (u == "BMO" or contains(u, "BANK OF MONTREAL") or contains(u, "BMO")) "bmo" else if (u == "TD" or contains(u, "TD") or endsWith(u, "TD") or startsWith(u, "TD")) "td" else if (contains(u, "SCOTIA") or u == "SCO") "scotia" else if (u == "CIBC" or startsWith(u, "CIB")) "cibc" else "default" } fun bankDisplayNameFrom(b, k) = if (k == "rbc") "Royal Bank of Canada" else if (k == "bmo") "BMO" else if (k == "td") "TD Canada Trust" else if (k == "scotia") "Scotiabank" else if (k == "cibc") "CIBC" else b default "External bank" var currentTime = now() var sec = (payload.expires_in default 3600) as Number var expiresAt = currentTime + (("PT" ++ (sec as String) ++ "S") as Period) var stateRaw = attributes.queryParams.state default "" var stateParts = stateRaw splitBy "__OB__" var fallbackBank = if (sizeOf(stateParts) > 0) trim(stateParts[0] as String) else "" var fallbackScopesCsv = if (sizeOf(stateParts) > 1) stateParts[1] else "" var fallbackTech = (fallbackScopesCsv splitBy ",") map trim($) filter (!isEmpty($)) var pIn = vars.oauthPending var p = if (pIn == null) {} else pIn var hasPendingBank = !isEmpty(p.bankName default "") var tokenScopeParts = (payload.scope default "") splitBy " " map trim($) filter (!isEmpty($)) var fdxCodes = ["ACCOUNT_BASIC", "TRANSACTIONS", "CUSTOMER_CONTACT"] var tokenFdx = tokenScopeParts filter ((t) -> contains(fdxCodes, upper(t))) var techFromPending = p.scopesTechnical default [] var techBase = if (!isEmpty(techFromPending)) techFromPending else fallbackTech var mergedTech = (techBase ++ tokenFdx) distinctBy ((x) -> upper(x as String)) var mergedHuman = mergedTech map fdxHuman($) var bankName = if (hasPendingBank) (p.bankName as String) else (if (!isEmpty(fallbackBank)) fallbackBank else "External bank") var pendingBrandRaw = trim(p.bankBrand default "") var bankBrand = if (!isEmpty(pendingBrandRaw) and lower(pendingBrandRaw) != "default") (p.bankBrand as String) else bankBrandKey(bankName) var bankDisplayName = if (!isEmpty(p.bankDisplayName default "")) (p.bankDisplayName as String) else bankDisplayNameFrom(bankName, bankBrand) var scopesCsv = mergedTech joinBy "," --- { access_token: payload.access_token, id_token: payload.id_token, token_type: payload.token_type default "Bearer", expires_in: payload.expires_in, expires_at: expiresAt as String, stored_at: currentTime as String, session_id: "oauth_session_" ++ uuid(), bankName: bankName, bankDisplayName: bankDisplayName, bankBrand: bankBrand, requested_scopes: scopesCsv, scopes_technical: mergedTech, scopes_human: mergedHuman, oauth_grant_scope: payload.scope default "", consent_created_at: p.createdAt default "" }

os:remove.doc:name: Delete pending consent
os:remove.key: #[%dw 2.0 var parts = (attributes.queryParams.state default "") splitBy "__OB__" --- if (sizeOf(parts) > 0) "ob_oauth_pending__" ++ parts[sizeOf(parts) - 1] else "ob_oauth_pending__invalid"]

logger.doc:name: Log Token Storage
logger.message: OAuth tokens stored successfully in memory with session ID: #[payload.session_id], expires at: #[payload.expires_at]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java import * from dw::core::URL var s = vars.oauthTokens var bankName = s.bankName default "Bank" var scopesCsv = s.requested_scopes default "" --- { redirectLocation: "${frontend.base_url}/?status=success&bank=" ++ encodeURIComponent(bankName as String) ++ "&scopes=" ++ encodeURIComponent(scopesCsv as String), httpStatus: 302 }

logger.doc:name: Log Token Error
logger.message: Token exchange failed with status: #[attributes.statusCode], response: #[payload]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- { redirectLocation: "${frontend.base_url}" ++ "${frontend.error_redirect_path}" ++ "&error=token_exchange_failed", httpStatus: 302 }
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { redirectLocation: "${frontend.base_url}" ++ "${frontend.error_redirect_path}" ++ "&error=internal_error", httpStatus: 302 }

logger.doc:name: Log Token Retrieval Request
logger.message: Attempting to retrieve stored OAuth tokens from object store

logger.doc:name: OAuth store miss
logger.message: No OAuth session in object store (or retrieve error): #[error.errorType]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var currentTime = now() var tokenExpiresAt = vars.oauthTokens.expires_at as DateTime var isExpired = currentTime > tokenExpiresAt --- { tokens: vars.oauthTokens, isExpired: isExpired, currentTime: currentTime as String, expiresAt: tokenExpiresAt as String }

logger.doc:name: Log Expired Tokens
logger.message: OAuth tokens have expired. Current time: #[payload.currentTime], Token expired at: #[payload.expiresAt]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "token_expired", "error_description": "OAuth tokens have expired. Please re-authenticate.", "expired_at": payload.expiresAt }

logger.doc:name: Log Valid Tokens
logger.message: OAuth tokens are valid and available. Session ID: #[payload.tokens.session_id]

logger.doc:name: Log No Tokens
logger.message: No OAuth tokens found in memory. User needs to authenticate first.

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "no_tokens", "error_description": "No OAuth tokens found. Please authenticate first by connecting your bank account." }

%dw 2.0 output application/json fun bankBrandKey(b) = do { var u = upper(trim(b as String default "")) --- if (u == "RBC" or contains(u, "ROYAL")) "rbc" else if (u == "BMO" or contains(u, "BANK OF MONTREAL") or contains(u, "BMO")) "bmo" else if (u == "TD" or contains(u, "TD") or endsWith(u, "TD") or startsWith(u, "TD")) "td" else if (contains(u, "SCOTIA") or u == "SCO") "scotia" else if (u == "CIBC" or startsWith(u, "CIB")) "cibc" else "default" } var s = vars.sess var at = s.access_token default "" var dotParts = at splitBy "." var looksLikeJwt = sizeOf(dotParts filter (!isEmpty($))) == 3 var rawBrand = trim(s.bankBrand default "") var bankBrandOut = if (!isEmpty(rawBrand) and lower(rawBrand) != "default") rawBrand else bankBrandKey(s.bankName default "") --- { access_token: s.access_token, id_token: s.id_token, token_type: s.token_type default "Bearer", expires_at: s.expires_at, session_id: s.session_id, bankName: s.bankName, bankDisplayName: s.bankDisplayName default s.bankName, bankBrand: bankBrandOut, requested_scopes: s.requested_scopes, scopes_technical: s.scopes_technical default [], scopes_human: s.scopes_human default [], access_token_format: if (looksLikeJwt) "jwt" else "opaque" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "no_session", "error_description": "No OAuth session on server. Connect your bank or clear completed flow." }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "status": "success", "message": "External bank connection removed. You can connect again anytime.", "timestamp": now() }
